infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos for reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to attach photos to reports.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NIT REPORT to access your camera to take photos for reports.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them securely in reports.
